title: Add editor tasks for skill eval suite
description: Document full skill A/B suite command and add VS Code / JetBrains run configurations to launch suite and open visual results.
close_reason: Added VS Code tasks, JetBrains run configs, and docs for running full skill A/B suite and opening visual results

title: Remove execute option from skill eval runners
description: Simplify skill A/B eval CLI by removing --execute; eval runners should always run real Goose scenarios and LLM grading.
close_reason: Removed --execute from skill eval runners; evaluations now always execute and LLM-grade, reducing CLI modes

title: Remove grade-mode option from skill eval runners
description: Simplify skill A/B eval CLI: remove --grade-mode and use LLM grading for real runs, with deterministic ungraded plan-only smoke outputs.
close_reason: Removed --grade-mode from skill eval runners; real runs always use LLM grading and plan-only runs are ungraded smoke checks

title: Support git refs for skill A/B baselines
description: Allow old/new skill A/B evals to materialize baseline and candidate skill directories directly from git refs instead of requiring --baseline-skill-dir snapshots.
close_reason: Added --baseline-git-ref and --candidate-git-ref for old/new skill A/B evals; documented git-ref workflow and validated plan smoke

title: Add full skill eval suite runner and docs
description: Add an official command to run all skill A/B evals and generate a visual index for the suite results.
close_reason: Added full skill A/B suite runner, suite index HTML, and documented full-suite execution/visualization

title: Extend eval A/B runner to agents and Goose recipes
description: Generalize the A/B eval runner beyond skills to evals/agents and evals/recipes, including recipe validate/render checks and named-agent old/new comparisons.

title: Implement skill A/B evaluation runner
description: Add a real with-skill/without-skill and old/new skill evaluation runner that executes Goose runs in isolated worktrees, grades outputs, aggregates benchmarks, and generates skill-creator review HTML.
notes: Implemented scripts/run-skill-ab-eval.py. It supports with_skill/without_skill and new_skill/old_skill configurations, isolated copied worktrees, grading.json/timing.json outputs, skill-creator aggregate_benchmark, and static generate_review HTML. Existing skill-creator viewer supports dynamic configuration names, so no local viewer fork was required.
close_reason: Implemented real skill A/B runner, documented with/without and old/new workflows, verified skill-creator viewer compatibility

title: Move generated docs under dist/docs
description: Update documentation build output to dist/docs/html and dist/docs/pdf, and refresh references/evals to the new generated docs paths.
close_reason: Generated docs now build under dist/docs/html and dist/docs/pdf; references updated

title: Align skill eval scenarios with harness domain
description: Rewrite evals/skills scenarios so prompts are about this Goose+Beads harness: skills, recipes, agents, docs, install scripts, and eval tooling, not unrelated app features.
close_reason: Rewrote skill eval scenarios to target harness recipes, skills, agents, docs, install scripts, and generated docs site

title: Document skill eval execution and visual review
description: Document how to run skill evaluation scenarios and generate the skill-creator visual review for eval definitions/results.
close_reason: Documented skill eval execution and visual review workflow

title: Remove mirrored skill eval resources
description: Clean project by removing bundled references/evals.json mirrors from skills and reverting docs to canonical evals under evals/skills.
close_reason: Removed bundled eval mirrors and restored canonical eval documentation

title: Package skills and embed skill eval metadata
close_reason: Packaged skills with bundled eval metadata and generated .skill artifacts

title: Move skill evaluations out of skill packages
close_reason: Moved skill evals to external evals/skills JSON suite

title: Investigate strict Goose skill isolation for baselines
description: The with_skill/without_skill runner injects skill text for with_skill, but local Goose may still auto-discover installed project skills. Investigate a clean-profile or environment approach for stricter blind baselines.
close_reason: Implemented isolated Goose HOME/cwd baseline by default; verified without_skill sees only builtin goose-doc-guide and no recipes; documented ambient mode and installed original skill default for old/new
